summary: Completed comprehensive testing of homepage performance improvements and match card styling enhancements. Verified caching behavior, compact design, and navigation functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'Please sign in' message even when user is authenticated
ui_bugs.selector: text=Please sign in to access advanced features

design_issues.issue: Match list container lacks max-width constraint for optimal centering

passed_tests: Backend API health check (94.4% success rate)
Homepage loads match cards instantly on return navigation (caching works)
Loading skeleton only shows when no cached data available
Match cards have compact styling (8px padding, 48px button height)
PREDICT MATCH button opens Advanced Options modal
Quick Predict tab is visible and active by default
League headers are compact (8px padding, 40px logo size)
Team crests load properly in match cards
Match card navigation to detail page works (/match/540665)
Prediction bars are display-only (cursor: default, gap-2 spacing)
Admin login successful with provided credentials
Main container has proper max-width (1536px) and centering
Prediction bars have compact spacing (gap-2 instead of gap-3)
PREDICT MATCH buttons are smaller (py-2.5 styling confirmed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication state in AdvancedOptionsModal - modal shows 'sign in' message even when user is logged in. Consider adding max-width constraint to match list container for better centering on wide screens.
